impact: This gives PP&D a deterministic schema for planning public fetches, preserving allowlist/robots/no-persist policy decisions before any live crawl while keeping fixtures free of response bodies.
summary: Add fixture-only planned crawl manifest contracts and tests without using private session paths or raw response bodies.
target_task: Task checkbox-33: Add a fixture-only crawl session manifest schema that records planned public fetch URLs, policy decisions, and no raw response bodies.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
